name: Chocolate Lace Cornucopias
recipeIngredient: Whipped cream or COOL WHIP whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large microwavable bowl, microwave sugar, corn syrup, and margarine on HIGH for 2 minutes or until boiling. Stir in chocolate until completely melted.
3. Gradually stir flour and nuts until well blended.
4. Drop by level tablespoonfuls about 4 inches apart onto foil-lined cookie sheets.
5. Bake for 10 minutes. Lift the foil and cookies onto wire racks. Cool 3-4 minutes or until cookies can be easily peeled off foil.
6. Remove foil; finish cooling cookies on wire racks covered with paper towels.
7. Place several cookies, lacy side down, on a foil-lined cookie sheet. Heat in the oven at 350°F for 2-3 minutes or until lightly softened.
8. Remove from foil, one at a time, and roll, lacy side out, to form cones. Cool completely.
9. Just before serving, fill with whipped cream.
Makes about 30 cornucopias.
Prep time: 20 minutes. Baking time: 12-13 minutes.
